title: Subitems View under Parent Items in Gantt view

posts.author: Adamr_Heavy (Adam Rahmani)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have many items/tasks with sub items with their own due dates and dependencies. I use Gantt view almost exclusevly and so do my colleagues.

How do I get the subitems to show under their parent task in gantt view?
I can only find the abilitly to show subitems completely seperate from their parent item and really give no context to how they flow in a true gantt view.

See image below!

Cheers,

Adam

Screenshot 2024-06-01 at 10.28.06 AM3968×2692 797 KB

posts.author: Aulysius_Corner_Rep (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

Looking for a way to view subitems indented under their parent items in the Gantt view? We’ve got the answer in the first episode of Aulysius Corner!

Our monday com specialist tackle this specific topic at the [03:30] mark in the video. They’ll explain the current functionalities to visualise your subitems within the Gantt view.

We cover many other questions in this episode, so if you have anything else on your mind, be sure to check it out:

  1. Go to Youtube
  2. Search → Aulysius Corner - Providing answers to monday com Community
  3. Get your problem solved!

Hope this helps!

~ Aulysius Corner Rep
